creator: bruce.richardson@intel.com
text:
Something seems very strange here. What version of FreeBSD and the DPDK port are you using?

Are you using the default config settings for the port?

What is especially strange is that most of the examples shown in the errors below e.g. "dpdk_qat", "exception_path" are removed from recent DPDK versions and don't actually exist in the pkg-plist file for DPDK, so I'm perplexed as to why they would be installed. [Just confirmed in the last ports snapshot I downloaded

Are you by any chance using a modified port that is based off an older version?
